---
title: "warden_latency.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\benchmarks\warden_latency.py"
loc: 53
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.53
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.67
---

## Intent
The `warden_latency.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_benchmark. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_benchmark. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)

### Exports
- `run_benchmark`
